title: Don't limit the disable DATE
poc:
INSERT INTO A VALUES (
   DATE '9999-01-01' + INTERVAL '1-00' YEAR TO MONTH);
key_bug_features: Inserting dates beyond the limit causes errors
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE B (b DATE NOT NULL, c INT CHECK (c > 0));
INSERT INTO B VALUES (DATE '9999-01-01' + INTERVAL '1-00' YEAR TO MONTH, 2);
SELECT * FROM B WHERE b > DATE '9999-01-01';
CREATE TABLE C (d DATE, e VARCHAR(50));
